elements.name: Copper
elements.curation_notes: Curated: L3M4,5M4,5 (1G) — the principal Cu LMM line. Cu2O/CuO LMM kinetic energies (Wagner-plot values) were not recoverable from archived NIST pages — region floor is fallback to cover them; hand-check. NIST also tabulates M3VV (61 eV, PEJ82) and L2-series satellite offsets (SA- records, Scho72 et al.) — not curated in v1. Values recovered from NIST SRD 20 v3.5 via Internet Archive snapshot (2004).

transitions.notes: NIST notation L3M45M45(1G); KINETIC energy. 25 NIST metal records span 918.1-919.0 with a tight modern cluster at 918.62-918.66 (SSA90 x2 918.62, BiSw80 918.62/.64/.66, AnSe84 918.63/.65, Asam76 918.65); no starred value on the archived page. Region (KE frame) floor extended to cover Cu2O/CuO whose LMM KEs sit lower — fallback, unsourced.
